title: LookAtPlayer
description: Looking at a nearby player while AFK
body:
# LookAtPlayer player head turns to look at nearby players while AFK, similar to the Citizens plugin.
Automatically disabled when you start moving
Your head turns, but your view/crosshair remains fixed.

**Configurable through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** ## Requirements/Installation 1. **Install the Fabric Loader**: - Download the Fabric Loader from the [Fabric website](https://fabricmc.net/use/). - Run the Fabric Loader installer and follow the on-screen instructions to install it for your Minecraft version. 2. **Install the Fabric API and Cloth Config API**: - Download the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/versions?l=fabric) - Place the downloaded JAR file into your Minecraft `mods` folder (located in the `.minecraft` directory). ## Demo ![demo](https://i.imgur.com/XgNuUEs.gif) ![Demo1](https://i.imgur.com/fjReIb0.gif) ![option](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ce3ae3854bcd999dcd8577630a8c98baf1a317c_0.webp)
